{{基礎情報 日本の神
| 名 = Totori-no-Kami
| 世代名 =
| 先代=
| 次代=
| 神祇 = <!-- 天神、地祇、天津神、国津神など -->{{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}}
| 全名 = Totori-no-Kami
| 別名 = Torimimi-no-Kami, Torikai-no-Kami
| 別称 =
| 神階 =
| 神格 = <!-- 太陽、月、山、海など司るもの -->Deity of ritual
| 陵所 =
| 父 = {{ill|Yashimamuji-no-Kami|ja|八島牟遅能神}}
| 母 =
| 親 = <!-- まぐあいによって生まれない場合 -->
| 配偶者 = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
| 子 = {{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神}}
| 宮 =
| 神社 =
| 記紀等 = {{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}
}}
'''Totori-no-Kami''' (''totori'') is a {{ill|goddess|ja|神 (神道)|lt=goddess|lt_ja=女神}} appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|ja|日本神話}}. Also called '''Torimimi-no-Kami''' (''torimimi'') or '''Torikai-no-Kami''' (''torikai'').

== Overview ==
A {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} appearing only in the ''Kojiki''. Daughter of Yashimamuji-no-Kami and sixth consort of Ōkuninushi-no-Kami. Besides the name Totori-no-Kami, she is also written as '''Torimimi-no-Kami''' or '''Torikai-no-Kami'''.

In ancient Japan, birds were thought to carry human souls, and catching those birds was a ritual act; her name is thought to mean "bird-catching".{{Sfn|Nishimiya|2014|p=381}}

== Genealogy ==
[[画像:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (according to the ''Kojiki''). Blue is male deities, red is female deities, yellow is undetermined sex.]]
Daughter of Yashimamuji-no-Kami; she bore Torinarumi-no-Kami with Ōkuninushi-no-Kami.

== Footnotes ==
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
=== Citations ===
{{Reflist}}
== References ==
* <!-- にしみや -->{{Cite book|和書 |title=Kojiki |volume= |date=October 30, 2014 |publisher={{ill|Shinchosha|ja|新潮社}} |ref={{SfnRef|Nishimiya|2014}} |author={{ill|Nishimiya Kazutami|ja|西宮一民}}, ed. |isbn=978-4-10-620801-0 |series={{ill|Shincho Nihon Koten Shūsei|ja|新潮日本古典集成}} (new edition)}}
== See also ==
* {{ill|Jūshichiseshin|ja|十七世神}}
* {{ill|Tottoribe|ja|鳥取部}}
== External links ==
* [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/totorinokami/ Totori-no-Kami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project]
{{日本神話}}
{{神道 横}}
{{shinto-stub}}
{{デフォルトソート:ととりのかみ}}
[[Category:国津神]]
[[Category:日本の神]]
[[Category:女神]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:長門国の人物]]
[[Category:十七世神]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:鳥取神]]
